# openmoe.ai

Byzantine-fault-tolerant consensus, Mixture-of-Experts routing, and EU AI Act compliance attestation for open-source AI infrastructure.

Part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign hive: https://meok.ai

- Pricing: https://openmoe.ai/pricing
- Signup: https://openmoe.ai/signup
- Docs: https://openmoe.ai/docs
- Partner: https://openmoe.ai/partner
